mapper.sql: id, user_name, user_pwd, user_header, user_phone, user_email, user_status, failed_attempts, lock_time, deleted, created_at, updated_at, last_login_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM `user`
deleted = 0
AND user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user`
deleted = 0
AND user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{userName}, '%')

SELECT
FROM `user` WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM `user` WHERE user_name = #{userName} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT ur.user_id, ur.role_id, r.role_name FROM user_role ur INNER JOIN `role` r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id IN
#{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `user` ( user_name, user_pwd, user_header, user_phone, user_email, user_status, failed_attempts, lock_time, deleted, last_login_time ) VALUES ( #{userName}, #{userPwd}, #{userHeader}, #{userPhone}, #{userEmail}, #{userStatus}, #{failedAttempts}, #{lockTime}, 0, #{lastLoginTime} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE `user`
user_name = #{userName}, user_pwd = #{userPwd}, user_header = #{userHeader}, user_phone = #{userPhone}, user_email = #{userEmail}, user_status = #{userStatus}, failed_attempts = #{failedAttempts}, lock_time = #{lockTime}, deleted = #{deleted}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET user_status = #{userStatus}, failed_attempts = #{failedAttempts}, lock_time = #{lockTime}, last_login_time = #{lastLoginTime} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET user_status = #{userStatus}, failed_attempts = 0, lock_time = NULL WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE `user` SET user_status = 'NORMAL', failed_attempts = 0, lock_time = NULL WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_status = 'LOCKED' AND lock_time IS NOT NULL AND lock_time <= #{unlockBefore}
UPDATE `user` SET failed_attempts = 0, lock_time = NULL WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_status = 'NORMAL' AND failed_attempts > 0 AND lock_time IS NOT NULL AND lock_time <= #{failureBefore}
UPDATE `user` SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM `user` WHERE deleted = 0 AND user_status = #{userStatus}
